About Us

About KisNos Global

KisNos Global is a leading export company based in India, specializing in the global supply of premium agricultural commodities. We are committed to delivering superior quality products that meet international standards.

With a strong sourcing network, strict quality control processes, and reliable logistics, we ensure timely delivery and customer satisfaction across global markets. We build long-term relationships through competitive pricing, consistent quality, and transparent business practices.

🌐

Global Reach

Exporting to Asia, Middle East, Africa and Europe

🔬

Quality Certified

Products meet international quality & safety standards

🤝

Trusted Partner

Transparent dealings and long-term client relationships

What We Export

Our Export Products

Premium agricultural commodities sourced from India's finest farms, carefully processed and packaged for global markets.

🌽

Maize (Corn)

High-quality yellow maize suitable for human consumption and animal feed, carefully processed to meet international standards.

Maize Exporter India
🧅

Onion

Fresh premium-grade onions from India's best farms — known for long shelf life, strong flavor, and consistent quality.

Onion Exporter India
🌿

Turmeric

High-curcumin turmeric with rich color and aroma — ideal for spice markets, pharmaceutical, and food processing industries worldwide.

Turmeric Exporter India
🌾

Millets

Nutritious organic millets including pearl millet (bajra) and great millet (jowar) — globally in demand as health superfoods.

Millet Exporter India
🫘

Chickpeas

Premium quality chickpeas with uniform size and excellent taste — suitable for food processing and direct consumption globally.

Chickpeas Exporter India
🍌

Bananas

Export-quality bananas with superior taste, proper grading, and hygienic packaging — delivered fresh to international buyers.

Banana Exporter India
Our Strengths

Why KisNos Global?

We go beyond just supplying commodities — we deliver reliability, quality, and a partnership you can count on.

01 🏆

High-Quality Agricultural Products

Every product is carefully sourced, graded, and tested to meet the highest international quality benchmarks.

02 💰

Competitive Export Pricing

Direct sourcing from farms means better prices without compromising on product quality or freshness.

03 🔬

Strict Quality Control

Multi-stage quality checks ensure each consignment is clean, safe, and compliant with destination market regulations.

04 🚢

Reliable Global Shipping

Efficient logistics network for smooth sea and air freight to all major international ports and destinations.

05 📦

Customized Packaging

Flexible packaging options tailored to client requirements — private label, bulk, retail, or custom branding.

06 ⏱

Timely Delivery Commitment

We honor deadlines because we understand that delayed shipments cost your business time and money.

Our Process

Quality Assurance & Packaging

At KisNos Global, we follow strict quality control measures at every stage — from sourcing to packaging.

1

Farm Sourcing & Inspection

We partner with trusted farmers and conduct on-ground inspections to ensure produce quality from the source.

2

Cleaning & Grading

Products are mechanically cleaned, sorted, and graded based on size, moisture content, and quality parameters.

3

Laboratory Testing

Samples are tested in certified labs for pesticide residues, microbial counts, and nutrient composition.

4

International Standard Packaging

Packed using export-grade materials that maintain freshness and safety throughout global transit.

Export Quality Guaranteed
Worldwide

We export agricultural products from India to international markets across four continents, with efficient logistics ensuring smooth deliveries.

🕌

🌍

East Africa, West Africa and North African nations

🌎

Europe

European Union and United Kingdom import markets
